emails.subject: RE: What is our
emails.body: RE: What is our Total gross margin/mmbtu for 2001: (includes merchant activity, peakers, etc.)excludes EES Wholesale= 3,643,000,000/152,246,250=24 gross margin related to gas, power, orig drift for 2001 (excludes EES Wholesale): 2,705,000,000/152,246,250=18 Total gross margin/mmbtu for 2001: (includes merchant activity, peakers, etc.)includes EES Wholesale= 3,115,000,000/152,246,250=20.50 gross margin related to gas, power, orig drift for 2001 (includes EES Wholesale): 2,177,000,000/152,246,250=14.29 To: Killen, Faith
